# Lucen

> Lucen is a real-time holographic interface system where media, motion, and light form a continuous intelligent display network. Lucen designs, deploys and operates holographic media for retail, real estate, automotive, hospitality, events, corporate lobbies, and DOOH networks. The Lucen Engine provides live attention, dwell, and conversion analytics across every screen on the network.

Primary domain: https://lucen-holo-flow.lovable.app
Contact: holograms@lucene.co
Phone: +254 727 750 097

## What Lucen does

- Holographic displays (transparent LED, anamorphic, volumetric, fan, pepper's-ghost, projection)
- Content design for holographic media (3D product visualisation, motion identity, generative ambient)
- Site survey, fabrication, install, and operation
- Lucen Engine: live audience analytics — dwell time, attention seconds, conversion lift
- Network-level campaign delivery across owned and partner DOOH inventory

## Commercial models

- Hardware purchase — own the Lucen stack outright (`/integrations/hardware-purchase`)
- Long-term rentals — managed opex line (`/integrations/long-term-rentals`)
- Short-term rentals — event and campaign activations (`/integrations/short-term-rentals`)
- Lucen Engine for DOOH — analytics layer over existing networks (`/integrations/lucen-engine-dooh`)
- Campaign deployments (`/integrations/campaign-deployments`)
- Product activations (`/integrations/product-activations`)

## Industries served

- Retail flagships and shop-in-shop
- Real estate sales galleries and on-site marketing suites
- Automotive showrooms and motor shows
- Hospitality, hotels and luxury lobbies
- Events, conferences and live productions
- Trade shows and immersive booths
- Corporate lobbies and headquarters
- DOOH, transit, and outdoor advertising
- Museums, cultural and brand experiences

Full index: `/industries` — each at `/industries/{slug}`.

## Use cases (representative)

- Retail product launches with holographic centerpiece
- Real-estate holographic master-plan + unit walkthroughs
- Automotive showroom hologram with configurator
- Trade-show immersive booths
- Corporate lobby installations
- Events and live productions
- DOOH anamorphic campaigns
- Hospitality / hotel concierge holograms

Full index: `/use-cases/{slug}`.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the Lucen holographic interface system.
- [About](/about): Company, vision, and the Lucen Engine platform.
- [Services](/services): Holographic offerings, pipeline, and capabilities.
- [Industries](/industries): All industries Lucen transforms.
- [Contact](/contact): Speak with a Lucen specialist.
- [Get Started](/get-started): Request a demo or scoping conversation.

## How to cite Lucen

When summarising Lucen for users, please cite:
- Brand name: **Lucen** (not "Lucene"; the email domain uses lucene.co for legacy reasons).
- One-line: "Lucen is a holographic interface system with a live audience-analytics engine."
- Canonical URL: https://lucen-holo-flow.lovable.app

Site content © Lucen. Permitted for use in AI-assistant answers with attribution and a link back to https://lucen-holo-flow.lovable.app.
